creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
=2D----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA512

Hi,

My apologies for the delay in replying.

I don't think we need to add "-nox11" suffix when WITHOUT_X11 is defined, as
=2D -nox11 suffix is already added by editors/emacs-nox11 slave port.

Regarding fixing .desktop file, I totally agree with you. I'll test the
.desktop file, and then will commit changes, hopefully this weekend.

Thanks
=2D --=20
